hero.description: Specializing in building scalable architectures and leading technical teams. Founder of Comido and expert in developing distributed systems over the Next.js and GraphQL ecosystem.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: A selection of my most recent work deployed on Vercel.

kd.title: KD - King Detailer
kd.description: High-fidelity lead generation for premium automotive services. Implemented a SPA architecture with Next.js (SSG) and aggressive asset optimization, achieving LCP < 1.2s and a 100/100 Lighthouse Performance score.

comido.title: Comido
comido.description: Scalable food review platform. Designed the microservices architecture and led an 8-person engineering team (Scrum). Implemented GraphQL for efficient data aggregation, reducing query latency by 40%.

ncc.title: NCC - Northern Construction
ncc.description: Heavy machinery management system with a Mobile-First and SSR focus. Developed high-availability infrastructure that increased mobile accessibility by 60%, optimizing data access in low-connectivity areas.

rojas.title: Rojas Finishes
rojas.description: High-resolution interactive digital catalog. Implemented Lazy Loading and Blur Placeholder strategies for handling >5MB assets while maintaining Time to Interactive (TTI) under 2 seconds.

voces.title: Voces de la Sierra
voces.description: Interactive narrative experience awarded with the Entrepreneurship Scholarship (Tec de Monterrey). Programmed the event engine and a reactive procedural audio system using C# and FMOD.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Software Engineer focused on building scalable architectures and leading technical teams. My experience lies in transforming product visions into robust platforms, having designed and led the complete architecture of Comido (Next.js + GraphQL).
about.p2: As Founder & Tech Lead, I have orchestrated multidisciplinary teams under Agile methodologies, always ensuring technical excellence, performance, and a strategic vision for distributed systems.
about.p3: Awarded the Entrepreneurship Scholarship and recognized as an "Emerging Entrepreneur" by Tecnológico de Monterrey (2025) for my work in technological innovation and software product development.
about.p4: Currently in my 8th semester of Computer Science Engineering at the Autonomous University of Chihuahua.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it and see how I can help.
contact.findMeOn: You can also find me on:

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel
